---
title: "Artificial Intelligence"
---
Study notes covering machine learning, deep learning, and agentic AI — from foundational theory to hands-on tooling.

## Areas of Study

### [Machine Learning](machine-learning/)
Notes from the [Machine Learning Specialization](https://www.coursera.org/specializations/machine-learning-introduction) by Andrew Ng (DeepLearning.AI / Stanford).

{{< course-listing machine-learning >}}

### [Deep Learning](deep-learning/)
Notes from the [Deep Learning Specialization](https://www.coursera.org/specializations/deep-learning) by Andrew Ng (DeepLearning.AI).

{{< course-listing deep-learning >}}

### [Agentic AI](agentic/)
Agent architectures, workflow orchestration, and hands-on builds.

{{< course-listing agentic >}}
